evals.prompt: I need to cache API responses for my ratings app. How do I store that data?
evals.context: User describing caching need without mentioning custom objects
evals.expected_behavior: Should recognize caching requirement and trigger generate-custom-object-impex with cache pattern

evals.prompt: Can you help me set up custom object storage for configuration data? It needs to persist across sessions.
evals.context: User needs persistent storage for app configuration
evals.expected_behavior: Should trigger generate-custom-object-impex with configuration storage pattern

evals.prompt: I want to log all API calls my app makes for auditing. What's the best way to store that?
evals.expected_behavior: Should trigger generate-custom-object-impex with audit log pattern, set appropriate retention
